hooks.command:
printf '## Knowledge base

This repo has an LLM-maintained wiki at knowledge-base/. Before substantive work:
- Read knowledge-base/wiki/index.md
- Skim the last entries in knowledge-base/wiki/log.md

Capture non-obvious findings as notes under knowledge-base/raw/notes/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md as you work. Ingest piled-up notes at task end. Full schema + workflows in knowledge-base/CLAUDE.md. Skills: /kb-ingest, /kb-query, /kb-lint.
'
